summary: Completed comprehensive testing of booking calendar improvements. Backend APIs working correctly with seed data, frontend calendar displays all required features including visual busy/free dates, proper date restrictions, and interactive selection.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Booking conflicts with existing demo bookings
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Expected behavior - seed data creates busy dates

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation buttons timeout during automated testing
ui_bugs.note: Core functionality works, only automation issue

passed_tests: Past dates (before tomorrow) grayed out and non-clickable
Busy dates marked in red with dot indicators
Available dates are white and clickable
Date selection works with orange highlight
Selected date shows formatted text below calendar
Seed endpoint creates 11 demo bookings successfully
Backend availability API returns correct busy dates
Price calculation works for members/external users
User authentication and booking flow works
